---
title: "Module 3"
subtitle: "Data Management in Practice - Case Study"
editor: source
params:
    module: 3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
bibliography: references.bib
---

This module focuses on a case study exploring data management practices. There is no lecture this week. The material is currently being developed.

## Learning Objectives

```{r}

lobj1 <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data/tbl-02-learning-objectives.csv")) |>
  dplyr::filter(module == params$module) |>
  dplyr::pull(learning_objectives)

```

*(Learning objectives to be defined)*

## {{< fa book >}} Readings

{{< fa book >}} Read @wilson2017 "Good enough practices in scientific computing".

## {{< fa code >}} Assignments

Complete by [**{{< var md-03.homework-due >}}**]{.highlight-yellow}.

-   [Assignment 1](../assignments/md-03/am-03-1-bookmarks.qmd): Support yourself with bookmarks
